title: assigned_agent field on tasks is decorative — nothing routes work based on it
body: The tasks schema has an assigned_agent field but no code reads it for dispatch routing. An agent could be assigned to a task and a different agent dispatched by the workflow. The execute-task workflow dispatches task-worker regardless of assigned_agent. Either the field should drive dispatch (workflow reads it and selects agent) or it should be removed to stop pretending.
